description: This file defines a TalesController class in Flutter/Dart that manages the state and data fetching logic for tales in the application. It handles loading tales, applying filters, and notifying the UI of changes.

classes.name: TalesController
classes.description: A controller class responsible for managing the list of tales, featured tales, and filter states, interfacing with a TaleRepository to load data and notifying listeners of updates.

methods.name: load
methods.description: Asynchronously loads tales and featured tales from the repository, updates the loading and error states, and notifies listeners.

methods.name: setCategory
methods.description: Sets the category filter and triggers a data reload.

methods.name: setAge
methods.description: Sets the age group filter and triggers a data reload.

methods.name: setQuery
methods.description: Sets the search query filter and triggers a data reload.
